attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
TVOUTPUT.BK_COMPANY_CODE as BK_COMPANY_CODE, 
TVOUTPUT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY as BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,
TVOUTPUT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE as BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE, 
TVOUTPUT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE as AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE, 
TVOUTPUT.AR_TRX_TYPE_DESCRIPTION as AR_TRX_TYPE_DESCRIPTION, 
TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DATE as START_DATE_ACTIVE,
COALESCE (MAX (TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DATE - INTERVAL '1' DAY) 
OVER (PARTITION BY TVOUTPUT.BK_COMPANY_CODE, TVOUTPUT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY, TVOUTPUT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE
ORDER BY TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DATE ASC ROWS BETWEEN 1 
FOLLOWING AND 1 FOLLOWING), DATE '3500-01-01') as END_DATE_ACTIVE,
TVOUTPUT.BATCH_ID as BATCH_ID,
TVOUTPUT.ACTION_CODE as ACTION_CODE, 
TVOUTPUT.EXCEPTION_TYPE as EXCEPTION_TYPE,
ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY TVOUTPUT.BK_COMPANY_CODE, TVOUTPUT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY, TVOUTPUT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE
ORDER BY TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DATE ASC) as RANK_INDEX,
(CASE WHEN RANK_INDEX = 1 AND NATTTV.SK_CUST_TRX_TYPE_ID_INT IS NOT NULL 
THEN 'U'ELSE 'I' END) as DML_TYPE, 
CAST (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP (0) as TIMESTAMP (0)) as CREATE_DATETIME,
TVOUTPUT.SK_CUST_TRX_TYPE_ID_INT as SK_CUST_TRX_TYPE_ID_INT ,
TVOUTPUT.SS_CODE
FROM
(SELECT
	BATCH_ID,
	BK_COMPANY_CODE,
	BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,
	BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE, 
	AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE,
	AR_TRX_TYPE_DESCRIPTION, 
	SK_CUST_TRX_TYPE_ID_INT, 
	SS_CODE,
	START_TV_DATE,
	CREATE_DATETIME, 
	ACTION_CODE, 
	EXCEPTION_TYPE,
	ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY BK_COMPANY_CODE,BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY, BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE, AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE,
	AR_TRX_TYPE_DESCRIPTION	ORDER BY CREATE_DATETIME DESC) AS ROW_NUM 
	FROM 
	(SELECT SORCTT.BATCH_ID, 
		EOUGC.BK_COMPANY_CODE BK_COMPANY_CODE, 
		EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY, 
		SORCTT.NAME BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE,
		SORCTT.TYPE_CODE AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE,
		SORCTT.DESCRIPTION AR_TRX_TYPE_DESCRIPTION,
		SORCTT.CUST_TRX_TYPE_ID SK_CUST_TRX_TYPE_ID_INT,
		NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE SS_CODE, 
		CAST (SORCTT.CREATE_DATETIME AS DATE) START_TV_DATE, 
		SORCTT.CREATE_DATETIME, 
		SORCTT.ACTION_CODE,
		'NE' EXCEPTION_TYPE
		FROM
		$$STGDB.ST_OM_RA_CUST_TRX_TYPES SORCTT,
		$$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY EOUGC,
		$$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
		WHERE SORCTT.ORG_ID = EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT
		AND SORCTT.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
		AND SORCTT.ORG_ID NOT IN (-3113,300,342,640,3)
		UNION ALL/*------------------------------------------------Newly added  CG FOR ST*/
		SELECT SORCTT.BATCH_ID, 
		EOUGC.BK_COMPANY_CODE BK_COMPANY_CODE, 
		EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY, 
		SORCTT.NAME BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE,
		SORCTT.TYPE_CODE AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE,
		SORCTT.DESCRIPTION AR_TRX_TYPE_DESCRIPTION,
		SORCTT.CUST_TRX_TYPE_ID SK_CUST_TRX_TYPE_ID_INT,
		NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE SS_CODE, 
		CAST (SORCTT.CREATE_DATETIME AS DATE) START_TV_DATE, 
		SORCTT.CREATE_DATETIME, 
		SORCTT.ACTION_CODE,
		'NE' EXCEPTION_TYPE
		FROM
		$$STGDB.ST_CG_RA_CUST_TRX_TYPES SORCTT,
		$$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY EOUGC,
		$$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
		WHERE SORCTT.ORG_ID = EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT
		AND SORCTT.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
		AND SORCTT.ORG_ID NOT IN (-3113,300,342,640,3)		/*------------------------------End of new  CG FOR  ST*/
	UNION ALL
		SELECT EORCTT.BATCH_ID, 
		EOUGC.BK_COMPANY_CODE BK_COMPANY_CODE, 
		EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY, 
		EORCTT.NAME BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE,
		EORCTT.TYPE_CODE AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE,
		EORCTT.DESCRIPTION AR_TRX_TYPE_DESCRIPTION,
		EORCTT.CUST_TRX_TYPE_ID SK_CUST_TRX_TYPE_ID_INT,
		NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE SS_CODE, 
		CAST(EORCTT.CREATE_DATETIME AS DATE) START_TV_DATE,
		EORCTT.CREATE_DATETIME, 
		EORCTT.ACTION_CODE, 
		EORCTT.EXCEPTION_TYPE
		FROM
		$$EXCEPDB.EX_OM_RA_CUST_TRX_TYPES EORCTT,
		$$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY EOUGC,
		$$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
		WHERE EORCTT.ORG_ID = EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT
		AND EORCTT.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
		AND EORCTT.ORG_ID NOT IN (-3113,300,342,640,3)
		UNION ALL
				SELECT EORCTT.BATCH_ID, /*-------------------------------------------NEWLY ADDED  FOR EX_CG*/
		EOUGC.BK_COMPANY_CODE BK_COMPANY_CODE, 
		EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY, 
		EORCTT.NAME BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE,
		EORCTT.TYPE_CODE AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE,
		EORCTT.DESCRIPTION AR_TRX_TYPE_DESCRIPTION,
		EORCTT.CUST_TRX_TYPE_ID SK_CUST_TRX_TYPE_ID_INT,
		NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE SS_CODE, 
		CAST(EORCTT.CREATE_DATETIME AS DATE) START_TV_DATE,
		EORCTT.CREATE_DATETIME, 
		EORCTT.ACTION_CODE, 
		EORCTT.EXCEPTION_TYPE
		FROM
		$$EXCEPDB.EX_CG_RA_CUST_TRX_TYPES EORCTT,
		$$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY EOUGC,
		$$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
		WHERE EORCTT.ORG_ID = EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT
		AND EORCTT.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
		AND EORCTT.ORG_ID NOT IN (-3113,300,342,640,3)/*------------------END OF EX_CG*/		
	UNION ALL
		SELECT -999 BATCH_ID, 
		NATTT.BK_COMPANY_CODE, 
		NATTT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY, 
		NATTT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE, 
		NATTT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE,
		NATTT.AR_TRX_TYPE_DESCRIPTION, 
		NATTT.SK_CUST_TRX_TYPE_ID_INT,
		NATTT.SS_CODE, 
		NATTT.START_TV_DATE,
		NATTT.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME CREATE_DATETIME, 
		'X' ACTION_CODE, 
		'NE' EXCEPTION_TYPE
		FROM
		$$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE_TV NATTT,
		$$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY EOUGC,
		$$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
		WHERE NATTT.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
		AND NATTT.BK_COMPANY_CODE = EOUGC.BK_COMPANY_CODE
		AND NATTT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
		AND NATTT.END_TV_DATE = CAST ('3500-01-01' AS DATE) 
		/*AND (NATTT.SK_CUST_TRX_TYPE_ID_INT,EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT,NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME) in   */
		AND (NATTT.BK_COMPANY_CODE, NATTT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY, NATTT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE ) IN  
			(SELECT EOUGC.BK_COMPANY_CODE, EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY, BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE FROM
			(SELECT SORCTT.CUST_TRX_TYPE_ID,SORCTT.ORG_ID,SORCTT.NAME AS BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE FROM 
			$$STGDB.ST_OM_RA_CUST_TRX_TYPES SORCTT
			UNION
			SELECT SORCTT.CUST_TRX_TYPE_ID,SORCTT.ORG_ID,SORCTT.NAME AS BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE FROM 
			$$STGDB.ST_CG_RA_CUST_TRX_TYPES SORCTT
			UNION
			SELECT EORCTT.CUST_TRX_TYPE_ID,EORCTT.ORG_ID,EORCTT.NAME AS BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE FROM 
			$$EXCEPDB.EX_OM_RA_CUST_TRX_TYPES EORCTT
			UNION
			SELECT EORCTT.CUST_TRX_TYPE_ID,EORCTT.ORG_ID,EORCTT.NAME AS BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE FROM 
			$$EXCEPDB.EX_CG_RA_CUST_TRX_TYPES EORCTT
			where EXCEPTION_TYPE='RI')ST		
		    INNER JOIN 
			$$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY EOUGC
			ON ST.ORG_ID = EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT)
		) TVINPUT 
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY TVINPUT.BK_COMPANY_CODE,TVINPUT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,TVINPUT. BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE, TVINPUT.START_TV_DATE ORDER BY TVINPUT.CREATE_DATETIME DESC) = 1
) TVOUTPUT
LEFT JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE_TV NATTTV
ON TVOUTPUT.BK_COMPANY_CODE= NATTTV.BK_COMPANY_CODE
AND TVOUTPUT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY= NATTTV.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
AND TVOUTPUT. BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE= NATTTV.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE
AND NATTTV.END_TV_DATE = CAST ('3500-01-01' AS DATE)
WHERE TVOUTPUT.ROW_NUM = 1

SELECT SORCTT.BATCH_ID, SORCTT.ACCOUNTING_AFFECT_FLAG, SORCTT.ALLOCATE_TAX_FREIGHT, SORCTT.ALLOW_FREIGHT_FLAG, SORCTT.ALLOW_OVERAPPLICATION_FLAG, SORCTT.ATTRIBUTE1, SORCTT.ATTRIBUTE10, SORCTT.ATTRIBUTE11, SORCTT.ATTRIBUTE12, SORCTT.ATTRIBUTE13, SORCTT.ATTRIBUTE14, SORCTT.ATTRIBUTE15, SORCTT.ATTRIBUTE2, SORCTT.ATTRIBUTE3, SORCTT.ATTRIBUTE4, SORCTT.ATTRIBUTE5, SORCTT.ATTRIBUTE6, SORCTT.ATTRIBUTE7, SORCTT.ATTRIBUTE8, SORCTT.ATTRIBUTE9, SORCTT.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY, SORCTT.CREATED_BY, SORCTT.CREATION_DATE, SORCTT.CREATION_SIGN, SORCTT.CREDIT_MEMO_TYPE_ID, SORCTT.CUST_TRX_TYPE_ID, SORCTT.DEFAULT_PRINTING_OPTION, SORCTT.DEFAULT_STATUS, SORCTT.DEFAULT_TERM, SORCTT.DESCRIPTION, SORCTT.DRAWEE_ISSUED_FLAG, SORCTT.END_DATE, SORCTT.FORMAT_PROGRAM_ID, SORCTT.GES_UPDATE_DATE, SORCTT.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE1, SORCTT.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE10, SORCTT.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE11, SORCTT.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE12, SORCTT.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE13, SORCTT.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE14, SORCTT.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE15, SORCTT.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE16, SORCTT.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE17, SORCTT.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE18, SORCTT.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE19, SORCTT.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE2, SORCTT.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE20, SORCTT.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE3, SORCTT.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE4, SORCTT.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE5, SORCTT.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE6, SORCTT.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE7, SORCTT.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE8, SORCTT.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE9, SORCTT.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY, SORCTT.GLOBAL_NAME, SORCTT.GL_ID_CLEARING, SORCTT.GL_ID_FACTOR, SORCTT.GL_ID_FREIGHT, SORCTT.GL_ID_REC, SORCTT.GL_ID_REMITTANCE, SORCTT.GL_ID_REV, SORCTT.GL_ID_TAX, SORCTT.GL_ID_UNBILLED, SORCTT.GL_ID_UNEARNED, SORCTT.GL_ID_UNPAID_REC, SORCTT.LAST_UPDATED_BY, SORCTT.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, SORCTT.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, SORCTT.MAGNETIC_FORMAT_CODE, SORCTT.NAME, SORCTT.NATURAL_APPLICATION_ONLY_FLAG, SORCTT.ORG_ID, SORCTT.POST_TO_GL, SORCTT.RULE_SET_ID, SORCTT.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID, SORCTT.SIGNED_FLAG, SORCTT.START_DATE, SORCTT.STATUS, SORCTT.SUBSEQUENT_TRX_TYPE_ID, SORCTT.TAX_CALCULATION_FLAG, SORCTT.TYPE_CODE, SORCTT.CREATE_DATETIME, SORCTT.ACTION_CODE 
FROM
 $$STGDB.ST_OM_RA_CUST_TRX_TYPES SORCTT
WHERE 
SORCTT.ORG_ID NOT IN (-3113,300,342,640,3)
AND 
(NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM   $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY EOUGC
                 WHERE SORCTT.ORG_ID= EOUGC. SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT)
OR NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM  $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
             WHERE SORCTT.GLOBAL_NAME= NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME)
)

SELECT SORCTT.BATCH_ID, SORCTT.CUST_TRX_TYPE_ID, SORCTT.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, SORCTT.LAST_UPDATED_BY, SORCTT.CREATION_DATE, SORCTT.CREATED_BY, SORCTT.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, SORCTT.POST_TO_GL, SORCTT.ACCOUNTING_AFFECT_FLAG, SORCTT.CREDIT_MEMO_TYPE_ID, SORCTT.STATUS, SORCTT.NAME, SORCTT.DESCRIPTION, SORCTT.TYPE_CODE, SORCTT.DEFAULT_TERM, SORCTT.DEFAULT_PRINTING_OPTION, SORCTT.DEFAULT_STATUS, SORCTT.GL_ID_REV, SORCTT.GL_ID_FREIGHT, SORCTT.GL_ID_REC, SORCTT.SUBSEQUENT_TRX_TYPE_ID, SORCTT.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID, SORCTT.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY, SORCTT.ATTRIBUTE1, SORCTT.ATTRIBUTE2, SORCTT.ATTRIBUTE3, SORCTT.ATTRIBUTE4, SORCTT.ATTRIBUTE5, SORCTT.ATTRIBUTE6, SORCTT.ATTRIBUTE7, SORCTT.ATTRIBUTE8, SORCTT.ATTRIBUTE9, SORCTT.ATTRIBUTE10, SORCTT.ALLOW_FREIGHT_FLAG, SORCTT.ALLOW_OVERAPPLICATION_FLAG, SORCTT.CREATION_SIGN, SORCTT.END_DATE, SORCTT.GL_ID_CLEARING, SORCTT.GL_ID_TAX, SORCTT.GL_ID_UNBILLED, SORCTT.GL_ID_UNEARNED, SORCTT.START_DATE, SORCTT.TAX_CALCULATION_FLAG, SORCTT.ATTRIBUTE11, SORCTT.ATTRIBUTE12, SORCTT.ATTRIBUTE13, SORCTT.ATTRIBUTE14, SORCTT.ATTRIBUTE15, SORCTT.NATURAL_APPLICATION_ONLY_FLAG, SORCTT.ORG_ID, SORCTT.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE1, SORCTT.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE2, SORCTT.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE3, SORCTT.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE4, SORCTT.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE5, SORCTT.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE6, SORCTT.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE7, SORCTT.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE8, SORCTT.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE9, SORCTT.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE10, SORCTT.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE11, SORCTT.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE12, SORCTT.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE13, SORCTT.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE14, SORCTT.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE15, SORCTT.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE16, SORCTT.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE17, SORCTT.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE18, SORCTT.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE19, SORCTT.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE20, SORCTT.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY, SORCTT.RULE_SET_ID, SORCTT.SIGNED_FLAG, SORCTT.DRAWEE_ISSUED_FLAG, SORCTT.MAGNETIC_FORMAT_CODE, SORCTT.FORMAT_PROGRAM_ID, SORCTT.GL_ID_UNPAID_REC, SORCTT.GL_ID_REMITTANCE, SORCTT.GL_ID_FACTOR, SORCTT.ALLOCATE_TAX_FREIGHT, SORCTT.LEGAL_ENTITY_ID, SORCTT.EXCLUDE_FROM_LATE_CHARGES, SORCTT.ADJ_POST_TO_GL, SORCTT.GLOBAL_NAME, SORCTT.CREATE_DATETIME, SORCTT.ACTION_CODE,
'RI' as EXCEPTION_TYPE
FROM
 $$STGDB.ST_CG_RA_CUST_TRX_TYPES SORCTT
WHERE 
SORCTT.ORG_ID NOT IN (-3113,300,342,640,3)
AND 
(NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM   $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY EOUGC
                 WHERE SORCTT.ORG_ID= EOUGC. SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT)
OR NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM  $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
             WHERE SORCTT.GLOBAL_NAME= NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME)
)
